overview: CryptoMarket P2P is a decentralized peer-to-peer crypto marketplace on the Internet Computer, supporting USDT/USDC stablecoin payments across TRC20, BEP20, ERC20, SPL, Polygon, and Avalanche networks. It features trustless escrow, shipping integrations with Ukrainian carriers, and a reputation system.
features: Trustless escrow with dispute resolution and jury voting
Nova Poshta, Ukrposhta, and Meest shipping integration with real TTN creation
Digital goods delivery with 24h inspection period
Reputation system with progressive trade limits and liability tracking
Crypto address verification via blockchain API calls (Level 2 on-chain check)
